title: Optimization Technique Conceptual Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative decision-making process of an advanced optimization algorithm, highlighting key components and their interactions.
relationships: Starts with Initial Solution/Guess, which flows into Evaluation Function, then to Gradient Calculation, then to Step Size Selection, which leads to Update Solution. The updated solution loops back to the Evaluation Function unless Termination Criteria are met, which ends the process.
